title: Review round 66: fresh full-codebase pass
close_reason: Round 66 complete. One new issue filed (nie-vy1q: CHRONO_MAX_DAYS silent truncation in ws.rs). nie-9qiu.7 updated with actionable note that sapling-crypto 0.7.0 is now on crates.io. nie-73ri.3 assessed as not worth fixing. All other paths reviewed: core/ (pow, auth, identity, messages, protocol, hpke, transport), relay/ (ws, store, state, payment_watcher, main), daemon/relay — no further issues found. Review loop reached bikeshedding territory.
